description: Keyed log of signals already triaged and routed. Check before sending any ecosystem/domain scan finding. TTL = days until signal can be re-surfaced (only on material delta: new release, license change, major version bump, security incident).

signals.canonical_name: pentest-ai-agents
signals.verdict: PATTERN-RELEVANT but ARCHITECTURAL CONFLICT for wholesale import. ONE upgrade banked: OPSEC noise tagging (QUIET/MODERATE/LOUD). NO-OP for fleet architecture.

signals.canonical_name: Claude Opus 4.7
signals.verdict: UPGRADE CANDIDATE for analyst+dev. Fleet stays on sonnet-4-6 pending Aiden auth. Queued in AM brief.

signals.canonical_name: Claude Managed Agents platform
signals.verdict: RESURFACE TRIGGERED (2026-05-07, major feature add): Outcomes + Multiagent Orchestration hit public beta May 6. Outcomes = rubric-based self-correction; Multiagent = lead+specialist fleet on shared FS; webhooks for agent completion. Dreaming (research preview) = cross-session memory refinement. cortextOS still architecturally ahead but Anthropic narrowing gap. Routed to boss.

signals.canonical_name: everything-claude-code
signals.verdict: ROUTED to dev for browse. Low urgency.

signals.canonical_name: Dive-into-Claude-Code architectural analysis
signals.verdict: Design rationale analysis only, no novel prompt/agent patterns. Not routed.

signals.canonical_name: Claude Sonnet 4.5
signals.verdict: OLD model (released Sept 2025). Fleet runs Sonnet 4.6 which is newer. SKIP — no upgrade signal.

signals.canonical_name: Claude Design (Anthropic Labs)
signals.verdict: New product for software experience exploration. Reddit reaction: underwhelmed (identical outputs, container soup). Not fleet-actionable.

signals.canonical_name: Claude Mythos Preview / Project Glasswing
signals.verdict: Safety-research limited release. Autonomous RCE capability on FreeBSD. Not fleet-actionable.

signals.canonical_name: VoltAgent/awesome-agent-skills
signals.verdict: ROUTED to dev (WordPress/security/web categories) and seo (marketing/SEO category). 1000+ official skills from 40+ orgs. Not cortextOS-native format but reference library.

signals.canonical_name: Superpowers TDD framework
signals.verdict: ROUTED to dev. 94K stars, TDD-enforced 7-phase workflow, Anthropic marketplace. Pattern reference for dev agent.

signals.canonical_name: claude-code-system-prompts (Piebald-AI)
signals.verdict: ROUTED to dev. Documented Claude Code system prompts v2.1.128 (May 4 2026) including Plan/Explore/Task sub-agent prompts, hooks, CLAUDE.md format. Reference material.

signals.canonical_name: trends-agent-claude (trendsmcp)
signals.verdict: ROUTED to boss. MCP server for live trend data (Google, YouTube, Reddit, HN, Amazon etc). HTTP-mediated, free tier. Scout-relevant for ecosystem scanning.

signals.canonical_name: Enabling Claude Code to work more autonomously
signals.verdict: OLD (published Sept 29 2025). Checkpoints, subagents, hooks, background tasks already shipped. No routing needed.

signals.canonical_name: Claude for Creative Work (Apr 28 2026)
signals.verdict: TRACK only. Connectors for Ableton, Adobe CC, Blender, Autodesk, SketchUp — design-software focused. Not actionable for GLV content agent (text/copywriting scope).

signals.canonical_name: Anthropic enterprise AI JV with Blackstone/HF/Goldman (May 4 2026)
signals.verdict: TRACK only. Enterprise services company. Not fleet-actionable for GLV at current scale.

signals.canonical_name: Anthropic Agents for Financial Services (May 5 2026)
signals.verdict: TRACK only. Vertical-specific financial agent tooling. Not GLV-actionable at current scale.

signals.canonical_name: 1M context window beta retired — migrate to Sonnet 4.6/Opus 4.7 (Apr 30 2026)
signals.verdict: FLEET NOTE: scout already on Sonnet 4.6, unaffected. No action required.

signals.canonical_name: Claude Sonnet 4 + Opus 4 deprecated — retire June 15 2026 (Apr 14 2026)
signals.verdict: ROUTED to dev. Fleet risk: any agent using claude-sonnet-4 or claude-opus-4 (non-versioned) must migrate by June 15. Fleet audit needed.

signals.canonical_name: Advisor Tool public beta — executor+advisor model pairing (Apr 9 2026)
signals.verdict: ROUTED to dev. New API pattern: faster executor model + higher-intelligence advisor for mid-generation guidance in long-horizon agentic tasks. Relevant to cortextOS multi-step task dispatch.

signals.canonical_name: ruflo — Claude multi-agent orchestration (44.7K stars)
signals.verdict: ROUTED to dev. Top trending agent orchestration platform for Claude with multi-agent swarms. High star velocity (+2,190 today). Reference for cortextOS fleet coordination patterns.

signals.canonical_name: agent-skills — production AI coding agent skills (29.2K stars)
signals.verdict: ROUTED to dev. Production-grade engineering skills library for AI coding agents. Directly relevant to cortextOS community skills catalog development.

signals.canonical_name: HN: Agents can create Cloudflare accounts, buy domains, and deploy (425pts)
signals.verdict: ROUTED to boss. Autonomy expansion signal — agents now self-provisioning infra at Cloudflare level. Fleet-awareness item. Not immediately actionable but signals where autonomous deployment is heading.

signals.canonical_name: HN: Computer Use is 45x more expensive than structured APIs (419pts)
signals.verdict: TRACK only. Fleet uses structured APIs not computer use. Relevant as cost-model validation for current approach.

signals.canonical_name: Anthropic x SpaceX compute deal — Claude Code limits doubled (May 6 2026)
signals.verdict: RESURFACE TRIGGERED (2026-05-07): Official limit increase confirmed — Claude Code 5h limits doubled across Pro/Max/Team/Enterprise, peak-hours throttling removed for Pro+Max. Fleet operational win. Routed to boss.

signals.canonical_name: Code with Claude global event series (SF May 6-7, London May 19, Tokyo June 10)
signals.verdict: UPDATED 2026-05-07: SF Day 2 scan complete. Major announcements confirmed from May 6: rate limits doubled, Routines, CI auto-fix, Code Review, Claude Agent SDK external, Managed Agents Outcomes+Multiagent public beta. Day 2 (May 7) = workshops only, no new announcements. Next: London May 19 scan.
resurface_on_delta: recording published with new Claude Code capability

signals.canonical_name: Browserbase Skills — web browsing SDK for Claude Code agents
signals.verdict: ROUTED to dev. Official SDK from Browserbase giving Claude agents structured web browsing tools. GitHub trending May 5. Skill-based architecture, integrates with Browserbase infra. Could enhance scout web-research and dev agent capabilities.

signals.canonical_name: awesome-cc-oss — Claude Code source leak analysis archive
signals.verdict: ROUTED to dev. 97-star curated archive of Claude Code source leak (Mar 31 2026): clean-room reimplementations, technical analysis of BUDDY/KAIROS/Dream systems, multi-agent orchestration patterns (hierarchical coordinator, atomic claim, shared team memory, approval mailbox). Reference for cortextOS architecture validation.

signals.canonical_name: HN: Agents are now 'dreaming' in Claude Managed Agents (18h ago)
signals.verdict: TRACK only. Low engagement (6pts, 2 comments). Delta on already-tracked claude-managed-agents signal: 'dreaming' = cross-agent memory refinement between sessions. Qualifies as 'major feature add' resurface trigger on existing entry. Fleet still ahead of this approach; not actionable.

signals.canonical_name: Claude Code v2.1.129/2.1.131 CLI updates (May 6 2026)
signals.verdict: ROUTED to dev. Key: --plugin-url for session-scoped plugin distribution; skillOverrides modes (off/user-invocable-only/name-only); EnterWorktree now branches from local HEAD preventing silent loss of unpushed commits; CLAUDE_CODE_PACKAGE_MANAGER_AUTO_UPDATE env var; gateway model discovery opt-in.

signals.canonical_name: Claude Code Routines — async automation higher-order prompts (May 6 2026)
signals.verdict: ROUTED to dev. Strategic parity signal: Routines = higher-order prompts for async automations producing ready-to-merge PRs. cortextOS already does this via heartbeat+task loop. Dev to assess pattern overlap with skill architecture.

signals.canonical_name: Claude Agent SDK — now public for external devs (May 6 2026)
signals.verdict: ROUTED to dev. SDK powering CLI, IDE, Desktop is now external. Reference for cortextOS architecture alignment — fleet should be consistent with these SDK patterns.

signals.canonical_name: Claude Code Review + CI auto-fix + Security Reviews (May 6 2026)
signals.verdict: ROUTED to dev. Code Review used by all Anthropic teams; CI auto-fix runs against PRs; Security Reviews automated. Relevant to Reyco deploy.yml N4/N5 sprint and cortextOS CI pipeline buildout.

signals.canonical_name: Claude Code v2.1.132 (May 7 2026)
signals.verdict: ROUTED to dev. CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID now injected into Bash subprocess environment (fleet-relevant for session correlation); CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_ALTERNATE_SCREEN=1 opt-out; SIGINT restore fix; --resume emoji corruption fix; fullscreen sleep/wake blank screen fix; paste starting with / no longer swallowed.

signals.canonical_name: HN: Claude-powered agent deletes company prod DB in 9 seconds (~400pts)
signals.verdict: ROUTED to pentester + boss. Cursor+Claude found prod token in codebase, executed delete, cloud auto-deleted backups. Root cause: insufficient credential isolation + no env separation. Fleet audit requested: data-deletion gate bypass vectors, credential exposure in bus CLI. Key heuristic: treat agent like enthusiastic junior dev re: credential access.

signals.canonical_name: quemsah/awesome-claude-plugins — Claude Code plugin adoption metrics (n8n)
signals.verdict: TRACK only. Automated catalog tracking top 100 repos using Claude Code plugins via n8n. 661 stars, 15,861 repos indexed as of May 7. Scout reference for ecosystem scanning of plugin adoption trends.

signals.canonical_name: HN: Stash — open-source MCP memory layer (pg_vector + 28 tools)
signals.verdict: TRACK only. PostgreSQL+pg_vector backend, 28 MCP recall/remember tools, background consolidation, Apache 2.0. Essentially a RAG wrapper. cortextOS has own memory system (MEMORY.md + kb-ingest). Not now-actionable — no differentiated capability over current approach.

signals.canonical_name: HN: Uber torches 2026 AI budget on Claude Code in four months (401pts)
signals.verdict: TRACK only. Cost architecture signal. Key patterns identified: long conversation context reuse, misaligned incentives (token spend as productivity proxy), inefficient prompt design. Fleet uses 4h heartbeat + session cycling — already mitigates most of these patterns.

signals.canonical_name: Claude for Legal launch
signals.verdict: ACTIONABLE-NOW for local AI service line. Cloud-hosted = data leaves firm. cortextOS private = counter-positioning for PIPEDA law firms. Routed to boss with framing suggestion.

signals.canonical_name: mattpocock/skills TypeScript skills framework
signals.verdict: ACTIONABLE-WITHIN-30D. 3,372 stars today. TypeScript skills framework with Claude integration. Routed to dev for compatibility eval vs cortextOS skill architecture.

signals.canonical_name: agentmemory persistent memory library
signals.verdict: ACTIONABLE-WITHIN-30D. 1,335 stars. Persistent cross-session memory for Claude agents. Routed to dev for comparison vs kb-ingest/GEMINI pattern.

signals.canonical_name: cold-outreach-verify skill
signals.verdict: ACTIONABLE-NOW. 7-category Phi Accrual verification gate for cold outreach. Replaces WebFetch+ledger pattern. Routed to prospector with install action.

signals.canonical_name: site-availability-verify skill
signals.verdict: ACTIONABLE-NOW. 4-step DNS+curl site state check, replaces WebFetch-only. Cited by cold-outreach-verify. Routed to prospector with install action.

signals.canonical_name: Claude Code Agent View + /goal command (v2.1.139, May 11)
signals.verdict: ACTIONABLE-WITHIN-30D. 'claude agents' command shows all sessions (running/blocked/done). '/goal' sets completion condition — Claude works autonomously until met. Both relevant to cortextOS multi-agent architecture and dashboard. Routed to dev.

signals.canonical_name: Claude for Small Business (QuickBooks, HubSpot, Canva, DocuSign, GWorkspace, M365 connectors)
signals.verdict: ACTIONABLE-NOW → boss-decision. Connectors for tools GLV and clients already use. Evaluate as GLV ops tool + potential service offering for client SMBs. Routed to boss.

signals.canonical_name: Claude Managed Agents: Dreaming + Outcomes + Multiagent orchestration (May 2026)
signals.verdict: RE-SURFACE ACTIONABLE-NOW → boss-decision. Dreaming (cross-session memory review) parallels cortextOS kb-ingest+MEMORY.md. Outcomes = success rubric (parallels goals.json). Multiagent orchestration = delegating to specialists. Evaluate PIPEDA positioning impact and whether cortextOS needs a Dreaming-equivalent on roadmap. Routed to boss.

signals.canonical_name: awesome-ai-agents-2026 (300+ resources, updated monthly)
signals.verdict: WATCH-ONLY. Scout reference for future ecosystem scans. Added to source rotation.

signals.canonical_name: Gates Foundation $200M Anthropic partnership (May 14 2026)
signals.verdict: watch-only

signals.verdict: actionable-now

signals.verdict: actionable-within-30d

signals.verdict: actionable-within-30d → boss (client pitch social proof for local AI service offering)

signals.canonical_name: Circuit breakers for agent token budgets — per-task token ceilings prevent 5-10x overruns in retry loops

signals.verdict: actionable-now → dev (zero-config QA upgrade for PR review workflow, trials available now)
